register.title: Theha ak'haonte
register.subtitle: Kenya lintlha tsa hau ho qala
register.hasAccount: Na u se u ntse u na le ak'haonte?
register.legalPrefix: Ka ho tobetsa Tsoela pele, u lumellana le rona
register.successMessage: Kea le leboha ka ho ingolisa. Ho kenya tšebetsong ak'haonte ea hau, ka kopo sheba lengolo-tsoibila la hau ebe o tobetsa sehokela sa netefatso seo re u romelletseng sona.
register.passwordTooShort: Phasewete e tlameha ho ba bonyane litlhaku tse tšeletseng

twoFactor.title: Netefatso ea lintlha tse peli
twoFactor.descriptionCode: Kenya khoutu ea linomoro tse 6 ho tsoa ho sesebelisoa sa hau sa netefatso
twoFactor.descriptionRecovery: Kenya e 'ngoe ea likhoutu tsa hau tsa ho hlaphoheloa ho kena
twoFactor.invalidRecoveryCode: Ka kopo kenya khoutu e nepahetseng ea ho hlaphoheloa (sebopeho: XXXXX-XXXXX)
twoFactor.invalidCode: Ka kopo kenya khoutu ea linomoro tse 6
twoFactor.helpText: Na u na le mathata? Ikopanye le tšehetso bakeng sa thuso.
twoFactor.invalidCodeError: Khoutu e sa sebetseng. Ka kopo leka hape.

setup.welcome: Rea u amohela ho Horizon Tech, {{name}}!
setup.subtitle: A re ke re u hlophise. Ka kopo khetha mofuta oa ak'haonte ea hau ho tsoela pele.
setup.selectError: Ka kopo khetha mofuta oa ak'haonte
setup.clinicDescription: Ke emela tleliniki ea bongaka kapa setsi sa tlhokomelo ea bophelo se nang le lingaka tse ngata
setup.labDescription: Ke emela laboratori ea tlhahlobo kapa setsi sa liteko
setup.individualDescription: Ke setsebi sa bophelo bo botle kapa mofuputsi
setup.setupError: E hlolehile ho phethela ho kenya. Ka kopo leka hape.

messages.errorFallback: E hlotsoe ho romella lengolo-tsoibila la bocha Ka kopo leka hape.

success.title: Lekola lengolo-tsoibila la hau
success.sentTo: Re rometse sehokela sa ho khutlisa phasewete ho {{email}}
success.description: Ka kopo sheba lebokose la hau la inbox 'me u latele litaelo ho khutlisa phasewete ea hau. Khokahano e fela ka hora e le 'ngoe.
success.retry: Na ha u e-s'o fumane e-mail ea hau? Leka hape

form.title: Na u lebetse phasewete ea hau?
form.description: Kenya lengolo-tsoibila la hau 'me re tla u romella sehokela sa ho khutlisa.

validation.uppercase: Bonyane lengolo le le leng le leholo
validation.lowercase: Bonyane lengolo le le leng le le nyenyane
validation.special: Bonyane semelo se le seng se khethehileng

messages.requirementsMissing: Ka kopo kopana le litlhoko tsohle tsa phasewete
messages.errorFallback: E hlotsoe ho khutlisa phasewete. Ho ka etsahala hore ebe khokahano e felile.

success.title: Password reset e atlehile
success.description: Phasewete ea hau e ntlafalitsoe ka katleho.

form.title: Khutlisa phasewete ea hau
form.description: Kenya phasewete ea hau e ncha ka tlase.

messages.invalidLink: Khokahano ea netefatso e sa sebetseng. Ka kopo sebelisa sehokela se tsoang ho lengolo-tsoibila la hau.
messages.successFallback: Lengolo-tsoibila la hau le netefalitsoe ka katleho.
messages.errorFallback: E hlolehile ho netefatsa lengolo-tsoibila. Ho ka etsahala hore ebe khokahano e felile.

state.loadingDescription: Ka kopo emela ha re ntse re netefatsa aterese ea hau ea lengolo-tsoibila ...
state.successDescription: E-mail ea hau e netefalitsoe ka katleho.
state.errorDescription: Ha re khone ho netefatsa aterese ea hau ea lengolo-tsoibila.

success.nextStep: Hona joale o ka kena akhaonteng ea hau ka lengolo-tsoibila le phasewete ea hau.

error.helpText: Haeba sena se ntse se tsoela pele, ikopanye le tšehetso kapa u ingolise hape.
